title: Synergy | MBA IB DSE
headings: It will be a conventional debate. Each team shall be represented by a maximum of two participants, each of whom will speak either for the motion or against the motion (both should have the same stand)

The event will consist of 3 rounds. Round 1 & 2 will be held online on Unstop whereas Round 3 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be a Quiz based on business news. Round 2 will be Online submission of B-Plan, and Round 3 will be "B-Plan presentation" in campus in front of judges.

The competition will be organised in 2 Rounds. Round 1 will be held online and Round 2 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be "Online Meme Challenge" on Unstop, where as Round 2 will be Product Portfolio Presentation.

The competition will be organised in 2 Rounds. Round 1 will be held online and Round 2 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be a conventional Quiz on Unstop, where as Round 2 will be Mock Stock Competition.
paragraphs: Calling all future business leaders! Get ready to ignite your intellect and showcase your writing prowess at Vishwavyapar 2024, the prestigious Article Writing Competition hosted by the International Business Cell of MBA IB at the Delhi School of Economics.
Topics will be disclosed on 16th February 2024. Articles in the form of write-ups/ case studies/analyses of actual cases/discussions/ comments related to the topic are invited

There will be 3 Rounds of Competition and it will take place on Campus. The participant will be shown a collage of photographs from respective movies and series and questions will be asked from the same. Other 2 Rounds will involve Video as well as Audio presentations and questions based on the same.

Each team shall be represented by a maximum of two participants, each of whom will speak either for the motion or against the motion (both should have the same stand)Date - 2nd March 2024 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 20,000Register Now CONUNDRUMThe event will consist of 3 rounds. Round 2 will be Online submission of B-Plan, and Round 3 will be "B-Plan presentation" in campus in front of judges.Round 1 - 5 March 2023 Round 2 - 15 March 2023 Round 3 - 25 March 2023 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 20,000Register Now YUVA KAALThe competition will be organised in 2 Rounds. Round 1 will be held online and Round 2 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be "Online Meme Challenge" on Unstop, where as Round 2 will be Product Portfolio Presentation.Round 1 - 21st - 24th Feb 2024 Round 2 - 25th - 29th 2024 Round 3 - 1st - 2nd March Prizes worth Rs. 15,000Register Now VISHWAVYAPARCalling all future business leaders! Get ready to ignite your intellect and showcase your writing prowess at Vishwavyapar 2024, the prestigious Article Writing Competition hosted by the International Business Cell of MBA IB at the Delhi School of Economics. Topics will be disclosed on 16th February 2024. Articles in the form of write-ups/ case studies/analyses of actual cases/discussions/ comments related to the topic are invitedDate - 25 March 2023 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 10,000Register Now RING TRADINGThe competition will be organised in 2 Rounds. Round 1 will be held online and Round 2 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be a conventional Quiz on Unstop, where as Round 2 will be Mock Stock Competition.Round 1 - 25th Feb 2024 (Online) Round 2 - 1st March 20224 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 10,000Register Now DATAVISTAThe competition will be organised in 3 Rounds. Round 1 & 2 will be held online and Round 3 will be held on Campus. Round 1 will be a Quiz containing around 50 questions on Unstop, where as Round 2 will be a dashboard competition and participants would be asked to create a dashboard on PowerBI, Tableau, or PowerPoint and Round 3 will be Q&A session based on Dashboard.Round 1 - 21 Feb 2024 Round 2 - 22 Feb 2024 Round 3 - 2nd March 2024 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 10,000Register Now IPL AUCTIONThis is a bidding competition of 2 rounds. The final round will be held offline during Synergy’24. In Round 1 each team should answer a set of questions that are related to sports. The selected teams in Round 1 will be given the names of 10 IPL teams and virtual money with which they can buy players in the auction. ​Round 1 - 2nd March 2024 (On-Campus)Prizes worth Rs. 5,000Register Now COUCH POTATOThere will be 3 Rounds of Competition and it will take place on Campus. The participant will be shown a collage of photographs from respective movies and series and questions will be asked from the same.
